news.headline: Iran's elections marred by economic and regional issues.
Xi highlights importance of strengthening party's governance system in recent statement.
BioArctic AB launched Leqembi in China as treatment for mild cognitive impairment, approved in Jan 2024.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, BioArctic AB's partner Eisai revealed the launch of Leqembi® in China. Marketed as "乐意保®" and known generically as lecanemab, the drug was approved in January 2024 for treating mild cases of a certain condition. BioArctic AB's stock is traded on NASDAQ Stockholm under the symbol BIOA B.

news.headline: XCMG unveils hydrogen-powered dump truck EHSL552F with 120kW fuel cell, highlighting commitment to renewable energy.
news.summary: In Xuzhou, China on June 27, 2024, XCMG Machinery introduced the EHSL552F, a cutting-edge hydrogen fuel cell dump truck model. The vehicle, designated with a 120kW hydrogen fuel cell and high-capacity battery system, is a groundbreaking solution aimed at curbing greenhouse gas emissions. This unveiling stands as a pivotal milestone for XCMG, listed under SHE:000425, in its commitment towards sustainable innovation.

Biden and Trump square off in heated presidential debate on CNN.

Abbisko announces impressive clinical trial data for irpagratinib + atezolizumab with 50% ORR for advanced HCC.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, Abbisko Therapeutics Co., Ltd. shared recent phase II clinical findings regarding their FGFR4 inhibitor irpagratinib (ABSK011) along with atezolizumab for treating advanced conditions. The data showcases promising results in this combination treatment.

Crucial stable FX rates reflect fundamentals accurately, preserving stability in markets.
Japan continues to demonstrate stability in its finances, evident in its impressive GDP of $5 trillion and negligible debt-to-GDP ratio of 200%.
Commitment to addressing excessive foreign exchange fluctuations with appropriate measures in place.
Growing worries about swift, unilateral currency shifts.
NowVertical announces grant of 1,775,000 stock options and 1,775,000 restricted share units to board members and management.
news.summary: Toronto-based NowVertical Group Inc. disclosed the issuance of 1,775,000 stock options and an equivalent number of restricted share units to select members of the board of directors and management team. The options and units were granted under the Company's omnibus incentive compensation plan. This move aims to incentivize key personnel with an equity stake in the company's performance. NowVertical Group Inc. is listed on the TSX Venture Exchange as NOW and on the OTCQB as NOWVF.

news.headline: Suzuki proposes Japan to gradually eliminate utility subsidy.
SCOTUS permits emergency abortions in Idaho, according to recent report. #SCOTUS #Idaho #abortion
Tezos X reveals modular blockchain design for scalability & performance with Smart Rollups & enhanced interoperability.
news.summary: Tezos X has unveiled a new blockchain framework featuring a modular structure to boost scalability and efficiency. The update showcases pioneering technologies like Smart Rollups and improved compatibility among different networks. This move is set to significantly enhance the platform's performance metrics and foster seamless integration, marking a notable milestone in Tezos X's journey towards innovation and growth.

Japanese finance minister Shunichi Suzuki delivers speech in Tokyo.
Suzuki resists drastic changes in currency exchange rates due to their impact on the economy.
Suzuki is worried about rapid foreign exchange changes; they urge for stability.
Suzuki plans response to significant currency fluctuations.
Suzuki declines to address significant fluctuations in foreign exchange rates.
Dow Jones Futures recover, tech stocks rise post debate; Meta Platforms breakout, Fed inflation data awaited.
news.summary: On Thursday, Meta Platforms experienced a significant surge in value as software stocks continued to rebound strongly in June. The upcoming debate between Biden and Trump, as well as the impending release of the Fed inflation gauge, are anticipated to have an impact on the market. Dow Jones futures managed to erase previous losses, with technology stocks showing notable growth. Investors are closely monitoring these developments, as they could influence market trends in the near future.

news.headline: Mitsubishi Electric delivers smart meter system to Taiwan market in a partnership with Chunghwa Telecom, supplying Taipower.
news.summary: In Tokyo, Mitsubishi Electric Corporation (Stock symbol: 6503) has revealed that, along with Glory Technology Service Inc. and Chunghwa Telecom Co., Ltd., they have provided Taiwan Power Company (Taipower) with a headend system to oversee smart meters. Additionally, they supplied communication modules for smart meters and data concentrator units. This initiative aims to centralize control and management of the smart meters. The project is currently operating partially.

news.headline: Biden emphasizes the need for the wealthy to contribute more to ensure Social Security solvency.
BNB Beacon Chain to introduce Second Sunset Upgrade, boosting mainnet performance and security for users. (Read More)
news.summary: The BNB Beacon Chain will soon roll out the Second Sunset Upgrade on its main network, aimed at boosting performance and security. This update is anticipated to significantly improve the overall functionality and safety of the network.

news.headline: Bitlayer's Mining Gala Season 2 offers $1.2M in token rewards with six protocols, on OKX Wallet Cryptopedia.
news.summary: Singapore, June 27, 2024 - The launch of Bitlayer Mining Gala Season 2 on OKX Wallet Cryptopedia marks a significant milestone in the crypto world. This event, led by Bitlayer, introduces the pioneering Bitcoin Layer 2 solution under the BitVM paradigm. The campaign has brought together six ecosystem projects including GamerBoom. This season's event promises to showcase cutting-edge technology and innovation in the cryptocurrency sphere.

news.headline: Amogy & Mitsubishi Shipbuilding finish feasibility study for ammonia-powered maritime solution. MoU signed.
news.summary: In Tokyo, Amogy, a company specializing in advanced ammonia-to-power solutions, and Mitsubishi Shipbuilding Co., Ltd. (MSB), a division of Mitsubishi Heavy Industries (MHI) Group, have finished a feasibility study on partnering for onboard hydrogen production and utilization. This collaboration involves integrating Amogy’s efficient ammonia-cracking technology with Mitsubishi's Ammonia Supply and Safety System (MAmmoSS®). Following the study, both parties have signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) to further explore the viability of this concept.

news.headline: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Dogecoin rise as Solana enters ETF, Bitcoin jumps to $62,300 but ends at $61,300. Ether at $3,400, Solana up 8% with $71.11M liquidated in 24 hrs. Gains in Open Interest, Solana sees 9% rise.
news.summary: The cryptocurrency market saw leading cryptocurrencies Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Dogecoin experiencing gains on Thursday following the entry of Solana (CRYPTO: SOL) into a popular exchange-traded fund for digital assets in the U.S. Bitcoin recorded a 1.14% increase to reach $61,490.42, while Ethereum saw a 2.26% rise to $3,439.83 and Dogecoin gained 3.55% to hit $0.1269. Bitcoin briefly spiked to $62,300 after VanEck filed for a Solana ETF with the SEC, but fell back to $61,300 by the end of the trading session. Solana, however, increased by nearly 8% during the last 24 hours. In total, 33,157 traders were liquidated, resulting in $71.11 million in liquidations, with 60% from short liquidations. Open Interest increased for all three major coins, with Solana witnessing a 9% rise in money locked in unsettled derivatives contracts, and Bitcoin’s OI increasing by 0.48%.

news.headline: Marina Bay Sands collaborates with Scuderia Ferrari for Formula 1 season, offering themed packages, entertainment.
news.summary: Marina Bay Sands has announced exciting plans for the upcoming Singapore night race season in 2024. Through its collaboration with Scuderia Ferrari, the integrated resort will offer specialized hotel packages, entertainment options, and unique themed experiences. This partnership aims to enhance the racing event experience for visitors. The curated offerings will include exclusive amenities and activities tailored to race enthusiasts. The initiative is part of Marina Bay Sands' preparations for the anticipated event, with various engaging opportunities planned for guests to enjoy. The resort is set to provide a memorable and thrilling experience during the Singapore night race season.

news.headline: ORIX submits Form 20-F for fiscal year ended March 31, 2024 to SEC on June 27, 2024. Available online for download.
news.summary: ORIX Corporation, with the ticker symbols TOKYO: 8591 and NYSE: IX, has filed its annual Form 20-F for the fiscal year ending on March 31, 2024, to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission on June 27, 2024. The submission includes audited financial statements and is available for download on ORIX’s website at the following link: https://www.orix.co.jp/grp/en/ir/library/20f/index.html. In addition to the online version, hard copies of the documents are also offered by ORIX free of charge.

news.headline: Huawei Digital Power and BatteroTech collaborate on green ecology with Mr. Zhu Chengjun leading the visit on March 14, 2024.
news.summary: In JIAXING, China, as of June 27, 2024, Mr. Zhu Chengjun, the General Manager of the ESS & Micro-grid Department within the Utility Smart PV Business at Huawei Digital Power, along with his team, paid a visit to BatteroTech on March 14th, 2024. They engaged in substantial discussions and were warmly welcomed by Mr. Hu Xiaodong.

news.headline: Biden acknowledges letdown among black voters.
Bitcoin 'wholecoiners' have held above 1 million for 13 months, despite market fluctuations.
news.summary: The count of individuals holding one whole Bitcoin, known as wholecoiners, fluctuates in tandem with the ups and downs of the cryptocurrency market. However, this number has remained consistent at over 1 million for more than a year.

news.headline: CCC Intelligent Solutions prices secondary offering of 30 million shares of common stock by Advent International and Oak Hill Capital Partners.
news.summary: In Chicago, CCC Intelligent Solutions Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: CCCS) revealed the pricing of a secondary stock offering by affiliates of Advent International, L.P. and Oak Hill Capital Partners. The offering involves 30 million shares of the Company's common stock, to be sold through negotiated transactions.

news.headline: ThreeD Capital Inc. acquired 1,500,000 common shares and 1,000,000 warrants of Quebec Innovative Materials Corp., increasing ownership above 10% on a partially diluted basis.
news.summary: In Toronto on June 27, 2024, ThreeD Capital Inc., a Canadian venture capital firm trading on the CSE under IDK and OTCQX as IDKFF, made an announcement regarding its recent acquisitions. Through a private placement and securities purchased on the Canadian Securities Exchange, ThreeD in partnership with Sheldon Inwentash obtained ownership of 1,500,000 common shares and 1,000,000 common share purchase warrants of Quebec Innovative Materials Corp. This acquisition resulted in ThreeD and the Joint Actor holding a stake of over 10% on a partially diluted basis in the Company.

news.headline: Japanese yen falls but recovers slightly as Mimura takes over as head of Japan's foreign exchange market.
Potential Solana ETF might be on the horizon with a new SEC head, as per analysts.
news.summary: According to two industry experts, to consider the establishment of a Solana Exchange-Traded Fund (ETF), it is crucial to have a new Chair for the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC).

news.headline: AI in the workplace can lead to loneliness among workers, impacting productivity. Harvard Business Review warns about the downside of efficiency.
news.summary: According to the Harvard Business Review, introducing AI to improve office efficiency may not always lead to happier employees.

news.headline: India Bonds now included in JPMorgan Index, could attract billions in investments, boosting economy.
Trump-Biden debate: US presidential candidates clash in CNN faceoff. Watch live on Bloomberg.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that over 100,000 new jobs were added to the economy last month, exceeding expectations. The unemployment rate dropped to 3.8%, marking a significant decrease from the previous month. Additionally, the stock market surged with the S&P 500 reaching a record high of 4,200. Experts predict continued growth in the upcoming months as the economy shows signs of recovery from the pandemic.

news.headline: HKMA & SFC update Financial Services Providers list for OTC derivatives with annual review. (Source: undisclosed)
news.summary: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) and the Securities and Futures Commission (SFC) have completed their yearly review of the Financial Services Providers list in compliance with the OTC derivatives regulatory framework. This update includes relevant information on approved institutions in the financial services sector. For more details, kindly refer to the official announcement.

news.headline: Australia's actual housing credit increased by 0.4%, matching a previous rate of 0.4%, with no forecasted change.
